last.input: debug why my python script crashes on import
last.preprocessed:
The script seems to be trying to import `pyautogui` and then crashing at this line:
```
import pyautogui
print(pyautogui.position())
```

This seems to be causing a `ModuleNotFoundError` because the module is not installed. It looks like you might need to have Python installed on your system, or it might be that your environment is not set up correctly for importing modules.
